scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c magenta,green "npm run dev -w @syunik/web" "npm run dev -w @syunik/api"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n WEB,API,MOBILE -c magenta,green,cyan "npm run dev -w @syunik/web" "npm run dev -w @syunik/api" "npm run start -w @syunik/mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @syunik/web && npm run build -w @syunik/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @syunik/web && npm run typecheck -w @syunik/api && npm run typecheck -w @syunik/mobile
